use_cases: Triggering actions with error/warning feedback states
Interactive UI buttons with multiple visual variants
ai_summary: A versatile button component from the Shugar design system featuring multiple size variants, type styles (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), and shapes (square, circle, rounded). Supports loading states with spinner, disabled mode, prefix/suffix icons, and shadow options. Designed for general-purpose use across SaaS, e-commerce, and dev tool applications.
